Company Logo:
Our Product Range:
At Carbon Carat Technology LLP, we specialize in advanced wide bandgap semiconductor
materials, combining exceptional purity, cutting-edge engineering, and sustainable innovation.
From electronic-grade diamonds (boron- and phosphorus-doped) to quantum-grade diamond
wafers, our solutions are engineered to exceed the highest industry standards.

6 kW MPCVD Diamond Deposition System
Applications
 High-quality electronic, optical and quantum grade single crystal diamond growth
 Polycrystalline & free-standing diamond films
 Advanced carbon nanomaterials: graphene, CNTs, fullerenes
Key Features
 High power-density 6 kW, 2.45 GHz microwave plasma
 Water-cooled stage & chamber for stable long-duration operation
 Plasma self-heating for substrate temperature control
 Full-range vacuum gauge for precise pressure monitoring
 Turbo + rotary pumps (up to 1×10⁻⁵ Pa) with automatic pressure control
 Efficient cooling system for high-power reliability
 24” monitor with PLC automation (stores more than 20 recipes)
 Fully automated process module for consistent, high-quality growth
Warranty
 12 months from installation or 14 months from shipment (whichever earlier)
 Excludes misuse, unauthorized modifications, and consumables
 Site utilities readiness required; delays do not extend warranty
 Reliable, automated, and precision-driven system for advanced diamond and carbon
material synthesis.

10kW/12kW MPCVD Diamond Deposition System
Applications
 High-quality electronic, optical and quantum grade single crystal diamond growth
 Polycrystalline & free-standing diamond films
Key Features
 10kW/12kW high power-density microwave plasma
 2.45 GHz magnetron for efficient plasma generation
 Wide plasma range: low to ultra-high power density with temperature control
 Recipe-driven computer control with pyrometer (400–1700 °C)
 Water-cooled aluminium structure for stability
 5 MFC gas lines (expandable on request)
Warranty
 12 months from installation or 14 months from shipment (whichever earlier)
 Excludes misuse, unauthorized modifications, and consumables
 Utility delays (gas, power, water) do not extend warranty
 High-power, precision-controlled system for scalable diamond and advanced carbon
material synthesis.

915 MHz MPCVD System (30 kW)
A next-generation, high-power MPCVD platform engineered for large-area, high-quality
diamond and advanced carbon material growth with exceptional process stability and control.
Applications
 High-quality single crystal diamond growth
 Polycrystalline & free-standing diamond films
 Advanced carbon nanomaterials: graphene, CNTs, fullerenes
Key Features
 30 kW high power-density microwave plasma
 915 MHz magnetron for deep plasma penetration & uniform growth
 Wide operating range: low to ultra-high plasma density with precise temperature control
 Recipe-driven automation with pyrometer (400–1700 °C)
 Water-cooled aluminium structure for continuous, stable operation
 Multi-gas MFC system (5 lines, expandable on request)
Warranty
 12 months from installation or 14 months from shipment (whichever earlier)
 Excludes misuse, unauthorized modifications & consumables
 Utility readiness required; delays do not extend warranty
 Built for high-throughput, large-scale, and precision-driven diamond synthesis.

Hot Filament CVD (HFCVD) Diamond System
A proven and cost-effective technology for high-quality diamond and advanced carbon coatings,
combining simplicity, reliability, and industrial scalability.
Applications
 Nanodiamond and microcrystalline diamond coatings
 CVD diamond films
 Graphene, CNTs, and advanced thin films
Key Features
 Mature, industry-trusted technology with simple and robust design
 High-performance deposition with excellent safety and reliability
 Double-layer stainless steel chamber for durability and thermal stability
 Compact, two-stage structure for efficient operation
 Integrated gas & vacuum system with optimized pipeline design
 Real-time monitoring and precise control of gas flow and pressure
 Fully automated control system for consistent, repeatable results
 Reliable, scalable, and efficient solution for industrial diamond and carbon coating
applications.

Thermal CVD System
Thermal Chemical Vapor Deposition (CVD) is a leading method for synthesizing high-quality,
large-area graphene by decomposing hydrocarbon precursors (e.g., methane) at high
temperatures (~650 - 1000°C) on catalyst substrates like Cu. It is ideal for depositing high-
quality conductive, semiconductor, ferroelectric, and optical films, with excellent capability
for evaporating refractory metals.
Applications
 Graphene, single-walled (SWCNTs) and multi-walled (MWCNTs) growth.
 Thin-film coatings for advanced materials
 Micro–nano device fabrication and processing.
 Research and small-scale production
Substrate Compatibility
 Rigid: glass wafers, silicon wafers, diamond wafers, etc.
 Flexible: PDMS, PTFE, PI
 Enabling uniform, and high quality graphene and CNT growth and precise coating
over both rigid and flexible substrates.

Magnetron Sputtering Coating System
A versatile thin-film deposition platform designed for precision coating of metals,
semiconductors, and dielectric materials. Widely used in semiconductor, LED, photovoltaic,
and advanced materials research, the system supports both R&D and small-batch production.
Applications
 Metal, semiconductor, and dielectric thin-film deposition
 Semiconductor devices, LEDs, and photovoltaic coatings
 Research laboratories and pilot-scale manufacturing
System Highlights
 Single-chamber, compact design for stable and efficient operation
 Integrated magnetron sputtering source with ion bombardment capability
 Rotating substrate holder with optical heating for uniform film growth
 Complete vacuum, gas flow, water-cooling, and safety alarm systems
 High-reliability sputtering power supply for consistent deposition
Automation & Control
 PLC-based intelligent control system
 Touchscreen interface for full process management
 Automated vacuum, sputtering, gas filling, and venting operations
 Engineered for high-uniformity coatings, process repeatability, and user-friendly
automated operation.

Electron Beam Evaporation Coating System
A high-precision thin film deposition system designed for advanced material engineering. It
integrates a vacuum evaporation chamber, E-type electron gun, thermal evaporation source,
rotating heated substrate holder, gas flow control, high-efficiency vacuum system, and
intelligent electronic controls—all built on a robust platform for stable and reliable operation.
Applications
Engineered for the deposition of high-quality conductive, semiconductor, ferroelectric, and
optical films. Ideal for research laboratories, academic institutions, and small-scale
production environments.
 Delivering precise, uniform, and high-performance thin film coatings for cutting-
edge applications.

Technical Articles
Microwave Plasma CVD System from SCD Growth
Simulation, development, and optical emission spectroscopy of microwave
plasma chemical vapor deposition reactor for synthesis of large-area single
crystal diamond, Next Materials 8 (2025) 100791.
Dependency of Deposition Parameters on Morphology of the Single Crystal
Diamond Films
Step growth in single crystal diamond grown by microwave plasma chemical
vapor deposition, Diamond & Relat. Mater. 15 (2006) 304.

CARBON CARAT TECHNOLOGY LLP (CCT)
Founded in 2021 by a team of professional engineers, CCT is a high-tech enterprise
specializing in advanced thermal and CVD equipment. We design and manufacture standard
and customized furnaces and related systems, delivering high quality at competitive cost.
What We Offer
 High-temperature CVD equipment (700–1200 °C, extendable up to 1700 °C)
 Customized solutions tailored to customer requirements
 Strong manufacturing base with reliable quality control
Our Strengths
 Expert team & rich industry experience
 Safe, high-quality materials
 Fast response and customer-focused approach
 Driven by professionalism and innovation, we deliver reliable equipment and
solutions to clients worldwide.
Team Work High-quality
Safe Materials Rich Experience
